value.stringValue: Vetting documents passed to vetting team
Vetting has been marked as failed

Flow.description: updated with latest knowledge library links - PT1-1528
Flow.label: Vetting and Compliance - Verification Flow

fields.name: Enhanced_Vetting_Status
fields.fieldText: Enhanced Vetting Status: {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Status__c}

fields.name: PORTWAlert
fields.fieldText:
Please Note!

You cannot pass this Enhanced Vetting to the Vetting Team until the candidate has a verified PORTW

fields.name: Pending_Dcos
fields.fieldText: Candidate has pending vetting documents, please get them to complete these before proceeding

fields.name: Completed
fields.fieldText: Candidate has completed all their vetting documents, please ensure they are all verified before proceeding

fields.name: Verified_Text
fields.fieldText: All vetting documents have been verified, please use the button below to pass this over to the vetting and compliance team

value.stringValue: Does this candidate need EC for immediate work?

fields.name: VerifiedText
fields.fieldText:
Vetting documents are currently being reviewed by the Vetting and Compliance team


﻿PDF Vetting Pack can be found under files (Use the "Generate PDF" button if this has not yet been generated)

fields.name: Enhanced_Vetting_Status_0
fields.fieldText: Status: {!Get_Vetting_Document.Status__c}

fields.name: Completed_0
fields.fieldText: Completed Date: {!Get_Vetting_Document.Document_Completed_Date__c}

fields.name: Verified
fields.fieldText:
Verified Date: {!Get_Vetting_Document.Verified_Date_Time__c}

Verified By: {!Get_Vetting_Document.Verified_by__c}

fields.name: Enhanced_Vetting_Status_0_0
fields.fieldText: Enhanced Vetting Status: {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Status__c}

fields.name: VerifiedText_0
fields.fieldText: Vetting documents are currently being reviewed by the Vetting and Compliance team

fields.name: Verified_0
fields.fieldText: Please use this box to include details of any changes to the candidates circumstances since they have completed this document. This includes details of new convictions, name changes and address changes.

fields.name: Enhanced_Vetting_Status_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Alert!

This will cancel this Enhanced Vetting process and all progress will be lost, are you sure you want to cancel

fields.name: Enhanced_Vetting_Status_0_0_0_0
fields.fieldText:
Alert!

This will mark this Enhanced Vetting record as failed and all progress will be lost, are you sure you want to cancel

fields.name: HealthText_0
fields.fieldText:
Action Required

Please upload the Occupational Health Certificate. Click here to view the Healthier Business process to obtain a certificate

textTemplates.name: ActionBody
textTemplates.text:
Hi {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.CreatedBy.FirstName},

The vetting and compliance team has flagged the following vetting pack as Action Required!

Candidate: {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Candidate__r.FirstName} {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Candidate__r.LastName}

Client: {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Client__c}

Reviewed By: {!$User.Name__c}

Action Required:

{!What_actions_are_required}

To quickly access this vetting pack use the link below:

https://blue-arrow.my.salesforce.com/lightning/r/Enhanced_Vetting__c/{!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Id}/view

Thanks﻿

textTemplates.name: AddText
textTemplates.text:
Verified By: {!$User.Name__c}

Verified Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

textTemplates.name: CompleteBody
textTemplates.text:
Hi

A candidate has completed their vetting process, see details below:

Candidate: {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Candidate__r.FirstName} {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Candidate__r.LastName}

Client: {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Client__c}

Cleared By: {!$User.Name__c}

Verified Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

To quickly access this vetting pack use the link below:

https://blue-arrow.my.salesforce.com/lightning/r/Enhanced_Vetting__c/{!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Id}/view

Thanks﻿

textTemplates.name: ECBody
textTemplates.text:
Hi

A candidate has been completed the EC process so can be put out to work for 20 days

Candidate: {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Candidate__r.FirstName} {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Candidate__r.LastName}

Client: {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Client__c}

To quickly access this vetting pack use the link below:

https://blue-arrow.my.salesforce.com/lightning/r/Enhanced_Vetting__c/{!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Id}/view

Thanks﻿

textTemplates.name: NoChangesText
textTemplates.text:
Please use this box to include details of any changes to your circumstances. This includes details of new convictions, name changes and address changes.

Changes in Circumstances: {!Changes}


Please ensure this section of the form is signed and dated by the RMG Representative or Agency Recruiter.

Signed By: {!$User.Name__c}

Signed Date/Time: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

textTemplates.name: OrigSeen
textTemplates.text:
Original Documents Seen By: {!$User.Name__c}

Original Documents Seen Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

textTemplates.name: PORTWText
textTemplates.text:
Proof of Right to Work

Citizenship Group: {!Get_PORTW.Citizenship_group__c}

ID Type: {!Get_PORTW.Identification_for_a_UK_citizen__c}{!Get_PORTW.Identification_Type__c}

Visa Type (If applicable): {!Get_PORTW.VISA_Type__c}

Right to work Verified By: {!Get_PORTW.Verfied_Record__c}

Original Documents Seen By: {!Get_PORTW.Original_Seen_by__c}


For any online Right to Work check, I can confirm that the person pictured on the Right to work home office confirmation form is a true likeness of the candidate I met today

textTemplates.name: VettingBody
textTemplates.text:
Hi

A consultant has marked the following vetting as verified, please check over all documents before marking the vetting as completed.

Candidate: {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Candidate__r.FirstName} {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Candidate__r.LastName}

Client: {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Client__c}

Verified By: {!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Verified_By__c}

Verified Date: {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}

To quickly access this vetting pack use the link below:

https://blue-arrow.my.salesforce.com/lightning/r/Enhanced_Vetting__c/{!Get_Enhanced_Vetting.Id}/view

Thanks﻿
